title: Crispy Herbal Italian Mars Bar Stir‑Fry
description: A low‑carb, herbal stir‑fry that blends savory crisped veggies, a dash of Mars chocolate for umami, and bright Italian herbs to soothe the hangover.
instructions: Heat a large skillet over medium‑high heat and add 1 tbsp olive oil.
Add the chicken strips, season with salt and pepper, cook until golden brown and cooked through, about 5 minutes. Remove and set aside.
In the same skillet, add remaining 1 tbsp olive oil and 1 tbsp butter; melt.
Add broccoli, bell pepper, and mushrooms; stir‑fry until vegetables are crisp‑tender, about 4 minutes.
Sprinkle in dried oregano and basil; stir for 30 seconds to release aroma.
Return the cooked chicken to the skillet; toss to combine.
Add chopped Mars Bar pieces, letting them melt slightly into the sauce, about 1 minute.
Drizzle fresh lemon juice over the stir‑fry; stir to coat and help caramelize the chocolate.
Season with additional salt and pepper to taste; adjust with more lemon if desired.
Serve hot, optionally garnished with a light sprinkle of parmesan cheese, and enjoy this crispy herbal Italian delight.
